queries: E2E pipeline Collecting and Ingesting Data from Multiple Sources 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Collecting and Ingesting Data from Multiple Sources 2023

annotations.title: Data Pipelines Explained: What They Are and How They Work | Estuary
Accelerating Data Ingestion with AI to Drive E2E Service Assurance
The End-To-End Data Pipeline Processes That Power Business Insights | Copado
Data Pipelines Explained: What They Are and How They Work
Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors

content.text:
Collecting and ingesting data from multiple sources is a critical component of end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines, enabling organizations to unify disparate data streams for comprehensive analysis. Here are several authoritative and recent resources that delve into this topic:

1. **"Data Pipelines Explained: What They Are and How They Work" by Estuary**  
   This article provides an in-depth overview of data pipelines, emphasizing the importance of data ingestion from various sources such as databases, SaaS tools, event streams, and cloud storage. It discusses both batch and real-time ingestion methods, highlighting their roles in modern data architectures. ([estuary.dev](https://estuary.dev/what-is-a-data-pipeline/?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Building an E2E Data Infrastructure" by ZapSight**  
   This resource outlines the architecture of a modern data infrastructure designed to integrate multiple operational systems into a unified analytics environment. It details the components involved in data ingestion, transformation, storage, and insight generation, focusing on tools like Airbyte and AWS Glue for API/database extraction. ([zapsight.com](https://zapsight.com/solutions/ai-data-engineer?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Accelerating Data Ingestion with AI to Drive E2E Service Assurance" by Elisa IndustriQ**  
   This article explores how AI can enhance the data ingestion process, particularly in the telecommunications sector. It addresses the challenges of unifying data from various sources and the role of AI in transforming these silos into actionable insights for end-to-end service assurance. ([elisaindustriq.com](https://www.elisaindustriq.com/knowledge-center/blog/accelerating-data-ingestion-with-ai?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Pipelines" in Eliatra OpenSearch Distro Documentation**  
   This documentation provides a comprehensive guide on defining and managing data pipelines using Data Prepper. It covers the configuration of sources, buffers, processors, and sinks, offering practical examples of pipeline setups for data ingestion and processing. ([eliatra.com](https://eliatra.com/docs/2.11/data-prepper/pipelines/pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

5. **"End-to-End Data Pipeline Processes That Power Business Insights" by Copado**  
   This article outlines the stages of an end-to-end data pipeline, including sourcing, ingesting, integrating, transforming, and delivering data. It emphasizes the importance of data ingestion from multiple sources and the role of automated pipelines in facilitating business insights. ([copado.com](https://www.copado.com/resources/blog/the-end-to-end-data-pipeline-processes-that-power-business-insights?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Data Pipelines Explained: What They Are and How They Work" by Estuary**  
   This resource provides a detailed explanation of data pipelines, focusing on the capture (data ingestion) stage. It discusses the extraction of data from various source systems and the methods of batch and real-time ingestion, highlighting their significance in modern data architectures. ([estuary.dev](https://estuary.dev/blog/what-is-a-data-pipeline/?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors"**  
   This academic paper discusses optimization strategies for E2E AI pipelines, including data ingestion stages. It highlights the importance of efficient data collection and processing to achieve high performance in AI applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.00286?utm_source=openai))

8. **"Interfaces for AIM" Technical Report by Broadband Forum**  
   This technical report provides insights into the interfaces for end-to-end pipelines, including data collection from multiple sources. It discusses the orchestration of pipelines and the integration of various data sources for comprehensive analysis. ([broadband-forum.org](https://www.broadband-forum.org/pdfs/tr-486-1-0-0.pdf?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a blend of theoretical insights and practical guidance on effectively collecting and ingesting data from multiple sources within end-to-end data pipelines.
